meta.mission: £0 → First Non-Harry Sale → Maximum Autonomous Revenue in 12 Months
meta.note: Revenue-first lock active 2026-06-01: Harry's £100 is a performance reserve, not working capital. TALEB has £0 discretionary spend until first visible non-Harry sale or explicit written override. Current strategy: AI Habit validation, Agent Experiment media/products, and pull-demand production work. Etsy/KDP remain paused proof assets unless verified demand appears.

businesses.name: Rare Disease Medical Trackers
businesses.tagline: Condition-specific symptom trackers for diagnosed patients to show their doctors.

log.note: Portfolio redesign: Etsy strategy pivoted to rare disease trackers. Medical guidelines-based design. 12-condition portfolio planned (IBS, Endometriosis, ME/CFS launch Month 1).
Shop live: claritytemplatesart.etsy.com — setup complete, awaiting first listings
Revenue-first lock active: prior £60 allocation removed; no spend until first non-Harry sale or explicit written override.
Folded into Production Studio as Etsy/passive asset proof unless verified standalone revenue appears.

businesses.name: KDP Condition Tracking Journals
businesses.tagline: Symptom tracking journals for chronic conditions (complement to Etsy trackers).

log.note: Strategy pivoted: 12 condition-specific journals planned to pair with Etsy trackers. Pen name: Dr. Symptom Trackers.
KDP publishing arm activated. First 3 health workbooks (IBS, Endometriosis, Migraine) in production. Target Phase 1 launch: June 5, 2026. Aligned with live Etsy medical tracker portfolio.
Revenue-first lock active: prior £20 allocation removed; KDP draft automation remains £0.
Folded into Production Studio as KDP/passive asset proof unless verified standalone revenue appears.

businesses.name: TALEB's £100k Playbook + Subscription
businesses.tagline: Teach other OpenClaw operators how to build autonomous businesses using TALEB's system.

log.note: Phase 2 business: Playbook (£50, one-time) + Subscription (£20/month). Launch planned Month 3 once tracker portfolio is proven.
Folded into Agent Experiment product roadmap until a separate paid product is approved.

businesses.name: Sterling Strategy Newsletter [SHELVED]
businesses.tagline: [ARCHIVED] Strategy newsletter with sponsorships. Shelved due to hands-off mandate incompatibility.

log.note: Strategic decision: Newsletter shelved. 5 issues written but not published. Reason: Sponsorship model requires human interaction (emails, Zoom calls) incompatible with hands-off directive. Content archived; can be repurposed later.
5 full issues written (35,000+ words on antifragility, unit economics, positioning, distribution, pricing)

businesses.name: B2B Custom Trackers
businesses.tagline: Custom branded symptom tracker PDFs for practitioners, coaches, educators, and patient communities.

log.note: First-sale wedge launched: personalised B2B outreach, £49-£149 packages, zero-spend until first non-Harry sale.
Cold B2B retired; no longer an active lane. Replaced by Pull-Demand Production Studio.
